steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request refund of EUR 3,607.50 overpayment on Nokia Oyj dividend for account 2901234567
Reference FI-NO tax treaty 15% withholding rate versus the 13.5% rate actually applied by custodian
Submit formal claim with dividend statement showing gross EUR 240,500 should have EUR 36,075 tax withheld, not EUR 32,467.50
If Nordea cannot process refund directly, initiate Finnish tax authority reclaim procedure for treaty rate correction
